title: Validate password complexity rules during registration
description: Test that the system rejects passwords that do not meet the specified security criteria and displays a clear error message.
preconditions: User is on the registration page

steps.description: 2. Attempt to register with a password missing an uppercase letter (e.g., 'invalidpass1!')
3. Attempt to register with a password missing a number (e.g., 'Invalidpass!')
4. Attempt to register with a password missing a special character (e.g., 'Invalidpass1')
5. Attempt to register with a password less than 8 characters (e.g., 'Val1!')

expected_result: For each invalid attempt, the registration fails and an inline error message is displayed clearly stating which password requirement was not met. The error code should be 'WEAK_PASSWORD'.
